description_long: This is a wooden stool with a round, flat seat and three slightly splayed cylindrical legs, each connected by a set of horizontal and diagonal stretchers for added stability. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the stool a natural, rustic appearance. The legs are evenly spaced and taper slightly towards the floor, providing a sturdy base. The seat is smooth and unadorned, with no backrest or armrests, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The stretchers form a triangular pattern beneath the seat, enhancing both the structural integrity and the visual interest of the piece. The overall finish is matte, highlighting the natural texture and color variations of the wood.
description: A rustic wooden stool with a round seat, three splayed legs, and triangular stretchers for support. The wood grain and matte finish give it a natural, sturdy look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, three legs, and the triangular stretcher arrangement clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the taper of the legs and the connection of the stretchers beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view with a direct look at the back leg and the symmetrical layout of the stretchers.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the round seat and the spacing between the legs, with the stretchers partially visible.
